raw_sql:
SELECT 
    department,
    COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') AS completed,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), 1) AS avg_pct_complete,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_duration_days
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY completion_rate_pct DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    department,
    COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS completed,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), ?n) AS avg_pct_complete,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_duration_days
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY completion_rate_pct DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    department,
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') AS completed,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_duration_days,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), 1) AS avg_pct_complete
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department, category
ORDER BY department, avg_duration_days ASC;

SELECT 
    department,
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS completed,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_duration_days,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), ?n) AS avg_pct_complete
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department, category
ORDER BY department, avg_duration_days ASC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'Cost Reduction') AS cost_reduction_count,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'Cost Reduction') / COUNT(*), 1) AS cost_reduction_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date) FILTER (WHERE category != 'Cost Reduction'), 1) AS avg_duration_excl_cost_reduction,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_duration_all
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY cost_reduction_pct DESC;
template:
SELECT
    department,
    COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = ?s) AS cost_reduction_count,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = ?s) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS cost_reduction_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date) FILTER (WHERE category != ?s), ?n) AS avg_duration_excl_cost_reduction,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_duration_all
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY cost_reduction_pct DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') AS completed,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'In Progress') AS in_progress,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_duration_days,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), 1) AS avg_pct_complete
FROM flag_30
WHERE category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY department, category
ORDER BY completion_rate_pct DESC;
template:
SELECT
    department,
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS completed,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS in_progress,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_duration_days,

FROM flag_30

GROUP BY department, category
ORDER BY completion_rate_pct DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    category,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'In Progress' AND end_date < CURRENT_DATE) AS overdue_in_progress,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'In Progress') AS total_in_progress,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'In Progress' AND end_date < CURRENT_DATE)
          / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'In Progress'), 0), 1) AS overdue_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date) FILTER (WHERE state = 'In Progress'), 1) AS avg_planned_duration_ip,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed'), 1) AS avg_planned_duration_done
FROM flag_30
WHERE category = 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY department, category
ORDER BY overdue_pct DESC;
template:
SELECT
    department,
    category,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s AND end_date < CURRENT_DATE) AS overdue_in_progress,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS total_in_progress,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s AND end_date < CURRENT_DATE)
          / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s), ?n), ?n) AS overdue_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s), ?n) AS avg_planned_duration_ip,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s), ?n) AS avg_planned_duration_done
FROM flag_30
WHERE category = ?s
GROUP BY department, category
ORDER BY overdue_pct DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date)::int AS year,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') AS completed,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_planned_duration_days,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), 1) AS avg_pct_complete
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department, year
ORDER BY department, year;
template:
SELECT
    department,
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM start_date)::int AS year,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS completed,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_planned_duration_days,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), ?n) AS avg_pct_complete
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department, year
ORDER BY department, year;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    state,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), 1) AS avg_target_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), 1) AS avg_pct_complete,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_planned_duration,
    COUNT(*) AS total
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department, state
ORDER BY department, state;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    category,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') AS completed,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed'), 1) AS avg_planned_duration_completed,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed'), 1) AS avg_target_completed,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed'), 1) AS avg_pct_completed
FROM flag_30
WHERE category != 'Cost Reduction'
GROUP BY department, category
ORDER BY department, avg_planned_duration_completed ASC;
template:
SELECT
    department,
    category,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS completed,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s), ?n) AS avg_planned_duration_completed,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s), ?n) AS avg_target_completed,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s), ?n) AS avg_pct_completed
FROM flag_30
WHERE category != ?s
GROUP BY department, category
ORDER BY department, avg_planned_duration_completed ASC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    CASE 
        WHEN target_percentage < 60 THEN 'Low (<60)'
        WHEN target_percentage < 75 THEN 'Mid (60-74)'
        ELSE 'High (75+)'
    END AS target_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') AS completed,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_planned_duration
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department, target_bucket
ORDER BY department, target_bucket;
template:
SELECT
    department,
    CASE 
        WHEN target_percentage < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN target_percentage < ?n THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS target_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS completed,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_planned_duration
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department, target_bucket
ORDER BY department, target_bucket;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (target_percentage < 60) THEN 'Low (<60)'::text WHEN (target_percentage < 75) THEN 'Mid (60-74)'::text ELSE 'High (75+)'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    COUNT(DISTINCT owner) AS distinct_owners,
    COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
    ROUND(COUNT(*)::numeric / COUNT(DISTINCT owner), 1) AS goals_per_owner,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') AS completed,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate_pct
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY goals_per_owner ASC;
template:
SELECT
    department,
    COUNT(DISTINCT owner) AS distinct_owners,
    COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
    ROUND(COUNT(*)::numeric / COUNT(DISTINCT owner), ?n) AS goals_per_owner,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS completed,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate_pct
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY goals_per_owner ASC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), 1) AS avg_target,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY target_percentage), 1) AS p25_target,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY target_percentage), 1) AS p50_target,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY target_percentage), 1) AS p75_target,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE target_percentage < 70) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_goals_below_70
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY avg_target ASC;
template:
SELECT
    department,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), ?n) AS avg_target,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(?n) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY target_percentage), ?n) AS p25_target,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(?n) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY target_percentage), ?n) AS p50_target,
    ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(?n) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY target_percentage), ?n) AS p75_target,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE target_percentage < ?n) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS pct_goals_below_70
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY avg_target ASC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') AS completed,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed' AND percent_complete >= target_percentage) AS met_target,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed' AND percent_complete >= target_percentage)
          / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed'), 0), 1) AS pct_completed_met_target,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Cancelled') AS cancelled,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Cancelled') / COUNT(*), 1) AS cancellation_rate_pct,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'In Progress' AND end_date < CURRENT_DATE) AS overdue_in_progress,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'In Progress' AND end_date < CURRENT_DATE) / COUNT(*), 1) AS overdue_rate_pct
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY pct_completed_met_target DESC;
template:
SELECT
    department,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS completed,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s AND percent_complete >= target_percentage) AS met_target,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s AND percent_complete >= target_percentage)
          / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s), ?n), ?n) AS pct_completed_met_target,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS cancelled,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS cancellation_rate_pct,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s AND end_date < CURRENT_DATE) AS overdue_in_progress,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s AND end_date < CURRENT_DATE) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS overdue_rate_pct
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY pct_completed_met_target DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed' AND category != 'Cost Reduction') AS completed_excl_cr,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed' AND category != 'Cost Reduction'), 1) AS avg_duration_completed_excl_cr,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed' AND category != 'Cost Reduction'), 1) AS avg_target_completed_excl_cr,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed' AND category != 'Cost Reduction')
          / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category != 'Cost Reduction'), 0), 1) AS completion_rate_excl_cr,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category != 'Cost Reduction') AS total_excl_cr
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY avg_duration_completed_excl_cr ASC;
template:
SELECT
    department,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s AND category != ?s) AS completed_excl_cr,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s AND category != ?s), ?n) AS avg_duration_completed_excl_cr,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s AND category != ?s), ?n) AS avg_target_completed_excl_cr,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s AND category != ?s)
          / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category != ?s), ?n), ?n) AS completion_rate_excl_cr,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category != ?s) AS total_excl_cr
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY avg_duration_completed_excl_cr ASC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    CASE 
        WHEN (end_date - start_date) <= 90 THEN 'Short (≤90d)'
        WHEN (end_date - start_date) <= 180 THEN 'Medium (91-180d)'
        ELSE 'Long (>180d)'
    END AS duration_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') AS completed,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate_pct
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department, duration_bucket
ORDER BY department, duration_bucket;
template:
SELECT
    department,
    CASE 
        WHEN (end_date - start_date) <= ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN (end_date - start_date) <= ?n THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS duration_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS completed,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate_pct
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department, duration_bucket
ORDER BY department, duration_bucket;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN ((end_date - start_date) <= 90) THEN 'Short (≤90d)'::text WHEN ((end_date - start_date) <= 180) THEN 'Medium (91-180d)'::text ELSE 'Long (>180d)'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    owner,
    COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') AS completed,
    ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed') / COUNT(*), 1) AS completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_planned_duration,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), 1) AS avg_target
FROM flag_30
WHERE department = 'Finance'
GROUP BY department, owner
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
ORDER BY completion_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT 15;
template:
SELECT
    department,
    owner,
    COUNT(*) AS total_goals,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) AS completed,
    ROUND(?n * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) / COUNT(*), ?n) AS completion_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_planned_duration,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), ?n) AS avg_target
FROM flag_30
WHERE department = ?s
GROUP BY department, owner
HAVING COUNT(*) >= ?n
ORDER BY completion_rate_pct DESC
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    state,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), 1) AS avg_pct_complete,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), 1) AS avg_target,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete::numeric / NULLIF(target_percentage, 0) * 100), 1) AS avg_pct_of_target_achieved,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), 1) AS avg_planned_days,
    COUNT(*) AS total
FROM flag_30
WHERE state IN ('Completed', 'In Progress')
GROUP BY department, state
ORDER BY department, state;
template:
SELECT
    department,
    state,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete), ?n) AS avg_pct_complete,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage), ?n) AS avg_target,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete::numeric / NULLIF(target_percentage, ?n) * ?n), ?n) AS avg_pct_of_target_achieved,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date), ?n) AS avg_planned_days,
    COUNT(*) AS total
FROM flag_30
WHERE state IN (?s, ?s)
GROUP BY department, state
ORDER BY department, state;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed'), 1) AS avg_target_completed,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage) FILTER (WHERE state = 'In Progress'), 1) AS avg_target_in_progress,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage) FILTER (WHERE state = 'In Progress') 
          - AVG(target_percentage) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed'), 1) AS target_gap,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed'), 1) AS avg_duration_completed,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date) FILTER (WHERE state = 'In Progress'), 1) AS avg_duration_in_progress,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete) FILTER (WHERE state = 'In Progress'), 1) AS avg_progress_in_progress,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed')::numeric / COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN ('Completed','In Progress')) AS completion_ratio
FROM flag_30
WHERE state IN ('Completed', 'In Progress')
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY target_gap DESC;
template:
SELECT
    department,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s), ?n) AS avg_target_completed,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s), ?n) AS avg_target_in_progress,
    ROUND(AVG(target_percentage) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s) 
          - AVG(target_percentage) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s), ?n) AS target_gap,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s), ?n) AS avg_duration_completed,
    ROUND(AVG(end_date - start_date) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s), ?n) AS avg_duration_in_progress,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s), ?n) AS avg_progress_in_progress,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s)::numeric / COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE state IN (?s,?s)) AS completion_ratio
FROM flag_30
WHERE state IN (?s, ?s)
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY target_gap DESC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    department,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete::numeric / NULLIF(end_date - start_date, 0)), 3) AS avg_progress_per_day,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete::numeric / NULLIF(end_date - start_date, 0)) FILTER (WHERE state = 'Completed'), 3) AS avg_progress_per_day_completed,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete::numeric / NULLIF(end_date - start_date, 0)) FILTER (WHERE state = 'In Progress'), 3) AS avg_progress_per_day_in_progress,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete::numeric / NULLIF(end_date - start_date, 0)) FILTER (WHERE category != 'Cost Reduction'), 3) AS avg_progress_per_day_excl_cr,
    COUNT(*) AS total
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY avg_progress_per_day DESC;
template:
SELECT
    department,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete::numeric / NULLIF(end_date - start_date, ?n)), ?n) AS avg_progress_per_day,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete::numeric / NULLIF(end_date - start_date, ?n)) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s), ?n) AS avg_progress_per_day_completed,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete::numeric / NULLIF(end_date - start_date, ?n)) FILTER (WHERE state = ?s), ?n) AS avg_progress_per_day_in_progress,
    ROUND(AVG(percent_complete::numeric / NULLIF(end_date - start_date, ?n)) FILTER (WHERE category != ?s), ?n) AS avg_progress_per_day_excl_cr,
    COUNT(*) AS total
FROM flag_30
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY avg_progress_per_day DESC;
